creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jkois       2010-11-03 19:38:12 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           commercial.software.xml 
  Log:
  Reclassify the entry for "Anthemion Software Ltd.".  The listed product "DialogBlocks" belongs to the development category.
  
  PR:     www/150924
  
  PR 150924 is related to this entry.  It is the same company, but they want to add a different product:
  
  - DialogBlocks  (a development tool)
  - Jutoh (an ebook editor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.32      +3 -3      www/share/sgml/commercial.software.xml
